text: Persist autonomy state in .bowman instead of the browser session
description: Move long-running autonomy state toward durable local storage in .bowman: identity, constitution/policy, runtime objectives, heartbeat/scheduler state, and recovery metadata. The frontend should observe and control that state, not own it.

status.comment: Session-level autonomy state is now starting to move into .bowman/runtime. Active watchdog sessions are mirrored there, but broader autonomy state like scheduler, identity, and policy is still not persisted.
